newValue.text: Trigger conditions defined per mission type (what counts as notable)
1–2 lines written per character per mission type (4 characters × 4 types = 16 reactions minimum)
Tone matches each character's established voice
Format ready to drop into mission flow as optional beat

snapshot.title: Write character science-reaction lines
snapshot.description: When a player annotates a notable science target (e.g. flags a transit signal on a TESS lightcurve, marks an anomaly on Mars, or logs a weather anomaly on InSight), the character could react with a short in-universe line. Design the trigger conditions and write 1–2 reaction lines per character per mission type. These would render as a brief narrative beat after game submission, before the next beat.
